expected_outcome: Competent backend developer with a deep understanding of Node.js event-driven architecture, file systems, writing RESTful Express APIs, and integrating databases.

phases.practice_schedule: 1.5 Hours daily building command-line utilities and parsing local log files.

mini_project.title: CSV Parser Command Line Tool
mini_project.description: Create a command-line script that parses a directory of CSV files, sums transaction numbers, and outputs a formatted JSON summary.

phases.milestone: Mastered running JavaScript outside browsers, calling file streams, and structuring Node.js projects with NPM packages.

topics.name: Express Routing Basics
subtopics: HTTP request methods (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE)

phases.practice_schedule: 2 Hours daily writing RESTful routes and custom validation scripts.

mini_project.title: Recipe REST API
mini_project.description: Develop an API server for cookbook recipes containing filtering filters, ingredients listings, and error validation blocks.

phases.milestone: Comfortable creating web servers, mapping route methods, injecting utility middlewares, and processing client payloads.

topics.name: Relational Integration (SQL)
subtopics: Connecting PostgreSQL / SQLite via pg client
Creating table schemas and writing query statements

topics.name: NoSQL integration (MongoDB)
subtopics: Creating, retrieving, updating and deleting models

phases.practice_schedule: 2 Hours daily scripting database models and building CRUD endpoints.

mini_project.title: Expense Tracking Microservice
mini_project.description: Build an Express API that stores logs of transactions in MongoDB, calculates total balance, and filters transactions by category.

phases.milestone: Equipped to interface backend servers with SQL or NoSQL databases and enforce validation limits on inputs.

phases.practice_schedule: 2 Hours daily testing APIs, implementing auth middleware, and checking test coverage reports.

mini_project.title: Secure Blog API server
mini_project.description: Establish a secure blog database service containing roles management, post categories, user profile updates, and Jest integration checks.

phases.milestone: Able to secure server routers, authorize tokens, write unit test scripts, and launch applications to cloud servers.

major_projects.title: Real-time Chat Backend Server
major_projects.description: Create an Express backend server with WebSocket support via Socket.io allowing users to join chat rooms, send messages, and log history into a database.

major_projects.title: File Storage and Streaming API Hub
major_projects.description: Build an API system that handles multi-part video uploads (Multer), streams video chunks back to clients (HTTP Range headers), and compresses uploads.
